name: Standard Client-Server
description: Standard dual-process update with GeneralSpacestation backend
best_for: First-time users, enterprise apps with backend
pros: Full control over version management; fine-grained Main/Upgrade differentiation; supports all event types
cons: Requires GeneralSpacestation or compatible backend; higher deployment complexity
keywords: standard, client-server, GeneralSpacestation, 标准, 客户端-服务端

name: OSS Object Storage
description: Update via S3/MinIO/cloud object storage; no backend server needed
best_for: Small projects, startups, no-backend scenarios, cost-sensitive
pros: Zero server cost; simple deployment; global CDN support; scales automatically
cons: No Main/Upgrade differentiation; Upgrade.exe must be in update/ subdirectory; no real-time version control
keywords: OSS, S3, MinIO, 对象存储, 无服务器

name: Silent Update
description: Background polling update with minimal user interruption
best_for: Long-running apps, kiosk systems, background services
pros: User-unaware updates; configurable poll interval; can pair with any strategy
cons: Requires notification strategy; poll interval tuning; no user feedback loop
keywords: silent, background, polling, 静默, 后台, 轮询

name: Differential Update
description: Delta patch update to save bandwidth (BSDIFF/HDiffPatch)
best_for: Large applications, bandwidth-constrained networks, frequent updates
pros: 60-90% bandwidth reduction; quick patch application; works over any transport
cons: Requires differential build pipeline on server; patch size limited (avoid >2GB); BSDIFF integer overflow risk in older versions
keywords: differential, delta, patch, BSDIFF, HDiffPatch, 差分, 增量

name: Cross-Version CVP
description: Skip intermediate versions and jump directly to target version
best_for: Skip multiple versions, forced updates, long-unupdated clients
pros: Bypass intermediate versions; reduce update steps; force minimum version compliance
cons: Requires CVP build pipeline; API compatibility risk for large jumps; full compatibility testing needed
keywords: CVP, cross version, skip, 跨版本, 跳版本

name: SignalR Push
description: Server-initiated push update via SignalR real-time connection
best_for: Real-time apps, urgent updates, managed fleets
pros: Instant update notification; server-controlled rollout; targeted version deployment
cons: Requires persistent connection; offline clients miss pushes; HubConnection lifecycle management; disposal/reconnect complexity
keywords: SignalR, push, real-time, 推送, 实时
